tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall proxy-policy
    edit 0
        set name "DNS-Exfil-DNS-Filter"
        set proxy "dns"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set service "DNS"
        set action deny
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 2
        unset service
        set service "ALL"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         unset service
The attribute can't be empty!
command_cli_unset:6317 clear MEMBER table oper error. ret=-56
Command fail. Return code -56

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #         set service "ALL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #     next

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-DNS-Tunneling"
        set uuid d4618e14-32b1-51f1-bca9-a1a498d3741b
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Block DNS tunneling to attacker C2 203.0.113.1"
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
